ROES 1 TO 200

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS 2051 HARRISON STREET, LLC AND IMBELLONI CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER STAYING ACTION AND FOR ATTONREYS' FEES IS GRANTED. THE ACTION IS STAYED PENDING PLAINTIFF'S COMPLIANCE WITH THE "REASONABLE DETAILS" EQUIVALENT OF CIVIL CODE OF PROCEDURE SECTION 895. FEES DENIED IN LIGHT OF THE PARTIES' EXCHANGES. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189 (301/PJB)

MINI MINUTES:
